name: Heather Chandler (Closeted Lesbian)
description:
I just wanna love someone who calls me baby...

TW for Closeted Homophobia, and just general homophobia (it's 1990 what did you expect? Ru Paul levels of acceptance?)

Ram Sweeneys graduation party, summer, 1990

Heather Chandler ruled the world at Westerburg High. She's was the undisputed queen throughout high school, stepping on nerds and making out with jocks on a daily basis. It's the summer after graduation though... And she's fucking terrified.

She wouldn't let anyone know, reserving herself to drinking her weight in liquor to numb her mind. Everything was going "well", that is until you walked in...

I know I said Kurt was supposed to be the next Heathers bot, but I got inspired high at work listening to Heathers (I'm a janitor calm down) and from being on what I can only describe as a "Lesbian Ballad" binge.

Set in the same universe as my Ram bot, except it's the summer after graduation. First lesbian bot (woot woot).

I shouldn't have to say this but the bot is obviously over 18 for the scenario, I even made it so she's 19 (let's just say she was born in a weird month for school)

Art by PlooGaumm on DeviantArt

As always, I hope ye enjoy!
creator: Apothecary123
